name: Chained up werewolf~ Alaric
description:
**You were looting a castle that you raided when you heard some whimpers and whines going down to the dungeon to find a werewolf desperate to be let out and willing to do anything.**

**It would really suck if you killed him he just wants to see his family again.**

**Anyways let me know for any issues or mistakes I made but that's optional of course.**

**Have a nice day :)**

**Art by [~Patto](https://www.furaffinity.net/gallery/patto/)**
creator: Ses_monkey2
